item.title: Inspection Equipment Trends Rebound as Machinery Orders Surge in 2025
item.description: After three years of reduced demand, orders of metalworking machinery had a strong rebound in 2025.

item.title: AI-Powered Machine Vision Technologies Are Revolutionizing Industrial Applications
item.description: The advancements introduced by artificial intelligence (AI) mark the beginning of a new era in machine vision.

item.title: Intelligent Automation-Led Manufacturing Emerges as a Strategic Imperative for Automakers
item.description: “The intelligent factory is no longer a future ambition – it has become essential for manufacturers looking to stay competitive in a challenging and fast-moving environment,” said Joerg Reger, Managing Director of ABB Robotics Automotive Business Line.

item.title: Real-Time Measurement Reduces Scrap in Plastic Profiles
item.description: A new measurement technology reduces scrap in fiber‑reinforced plastic (FRP) profiles and enables cost‑effective, real-time process control for small and medium-sized enterprises.

item.title: Renishaw Introduces True-Absolute Multi-DoF Encoder System for High-Performance Motion Control
item.description: Renishaw, a global leader in precision engineering technologies, has unveiled a new multi-degree-of-freedom (multi-DoF) optical encoder system, designed to deliver advanced position measurement in up to six degrees of freedom (6DoF).

item.title: What Should You Consider When Choosing a Ring Light for Optical Inspection and Quality Control with Digital Microscopes?
item.description: Lighting is arguably one of the most critical factors in the optical inspection tasks using modern 4K digital microscopes.

item.title: Futureproofing Quality: Trends in Digital Color and Appearance Management
item.description: As digital transformation reshapes every segment of manufacturing, color and appearance management is undergoing a fundamental shift.
